headline: Foxen Partners with Healthy Paws to Bring Discounted Pet Insurance to Multifamily Renters
summary: Foxen, a leader in multifamily solutions that reduce risk and build financial wellness for owners, operators and their renters, today announced a partnership with Healthy Paws, a Chubb company (NYSE: CB), and a leading provider of accident and illness pet insurance coverage for dogs and cats. This partnership enables eligible residents to receive a 5% discount* and streamlined access to new Healthy Paws policies within Foxen's pet management solution, PetClear. PetClear is an AI-enabled solution
